level1.name: meter.n.01
level1.definition: the basic unit of length adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites (approximately 1.094 yards)

level1.name: health.n.01
level1.definition: a healthy state of wellbeing free from disease

level1.name: inch.n.01
level1.definition: a unit of length equal to one twelfth of a foot

level1.name: experience.n.01
level1.definition: the accumulation of knowledge or skill that results from direct participation in events or activities

level1.name: cast.n.03
level1.definition: the distinctive form in which a thing is made

level2.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms

level2.name: wellbeing.n.01
level2.definition: a contented state of being happy and healthy and prosperous

level2.name: linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a unit of measurement of length

level2.name: written_record.n.01
level2.definition: a written document preserving knowledge of facts or events

level2.name: education.n.02
level2.definition: knowledge acquired by learning and instruction

level2.name: assets.n.01
level2.definition: anything of material value or usefulness that is owned by a person or company

level3.name: metric_unit.n.01
level3.definition: a decimal unit of measurement of the metric system (based on meters and kilograms and seconds)

level3.name: prosperity.n.02
level3.definition: the condition of prospering; having good fortune

level3.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level3.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level3.name: record.n.01
level3.definition: anything (such as a document or a phonograph record or a photograph) providing permanent evidence of or information about past events

level3.name: content.n.05
level3.definition: the sum or range of what has been perceived, discovered, or learned

level3.name: shape.n.02
level3.definition: the spatial arrangement of something as distinct from its substance

level4.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level4.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level4.name: good_fortune.n.01
level4.definition: an auspicious state resulting from favorable outcomes

level4.name: evidence.n.02
level4.definition: an indication that makes something evident

level4.name: cognition.n.01
level4.definition: the psychological result of perception and learning and reasoning

top_concepts.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
top_concepts.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

top_concepts.name: meter.n.01
top_concepts.definition: the basic unit of length adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites (approximately 1.094 yards)

top_concepts.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
top_concepts.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms
